zh.lifeSummary: 當Sabina Margaretha Meissner於1545年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩時，她的父親Nicolaus MEISSNER25歲，母親Rosina GLASER23歲。她於1568年與Valentin Beyer在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1613年9月17日在她的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sabina Margaretha Meissner于1545年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩时，她的父亲Nicolaus MEISSNER25岁，母亲Rosina GLASER23岁。她于1568年与Valentin Beyer在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1613年9月17日在她的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Meissner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerhard, Erwin, Hans, Claus, Fritz, Heinz, Siegfried, Ewald, Hanns, Helmuth.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Meissen in Germany, earlier (968 AD ) recorded as Misna, Misina, named for the small river Misna (today Meisabach), whose name is very ancient, probably pre-Slavic. The place was famous in the Middle Ages for the fine linen cloth produced there, and the German surname may also be an occupational name for a manufacturer or seller of such wares.

variants.name: Miesner
meanings: German: variant of   Meissner  . Compare   Misner  .

variants.name: Mizner
meanings: Americanized form of German   Meissner   or   Miesner  . Compare   Misner  .

variants.name: Meixner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Gerhard, Helmut, Joerg, Kurt.
German: variant of Meichsner, which is a variant of Meissner . This form is also found in Czechia.

variants.name: Misener
meanings: Americanized form of German   Meissner  . Compare   Misner  .

variants.name: Meisner
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Meissner  .

nameMeanings.name: Sabina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name meaning ‘Sabine woman’, used occasionally in England since the 14th century. The Sabines were an ancient Italic race whose territory was early taken over by the Romans. According to tradition, the Romans made a raid on the Sabines and carried off a number of their women, but when the Sabines came for revenge the women succeeded in making peace between the two groups. The name Sabina was borne by three minor early Christian saints, in particular a Roman maiden martyred in about 127 .

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margarethe
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Sabina Margaretha Meissner was born in 1545, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany, her father, Nicolaus MEISSNER, was 25 and her mother, Rosina GLASER, was 23. She married Valentin Beyer in 1568, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 17 September 1613, in her hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sabina Margaretha Meissner est née en 1545, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Nicolaus MEISSNER, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Rosina GLASER, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Valentin Beyer en 1568, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 septembre 1613, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sabina Margaretha Meissner 1545 in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicolaus MEISSNER 25 und ihre Mutter Rosina GLASER 23. Sie hat 1568 in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland Valentin Beyer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. September 1613 im Alter von 68 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sabina Margaretha Meissner è nata il nel 1545 nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Nicolaus MEISSNER, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Rosina GLASER, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Valentin Beyer nel 1568, nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 settembre 1613, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sabina Margaretha Meissnerが1545年にドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサで生まれた時，父Nicolaus MEISSNERは25歳，母Rosina GLASERは23歳であった。1568年にドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサでValentin Beyerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1613年9月17日に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sabina Margaretha Meissner(이)가 1545년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicolaus MEISSNER(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rosina GLASER(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1568년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 Valentin Beyer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1613년 9월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sabina Margaretha Meissner nasceu em 1545, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Nicolaus MEISSNER, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Rosina GLASER, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Valentin Beyer em 1568, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1613, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sabina Margaretha Meissner родилась в 1545 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Nicolaus MEISSNER было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Rosina GLASER, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Valentin Beyer в 1568 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 17 сентября 1613 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sabina Margaretha Meissner nació en 1545, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Nicolaus MEISSNER, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Rosina GLASER, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Valentin Beyer en 1568, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1613, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
